text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey! Who's calling me, and where are you?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh! Well, if it isn't the Three Goddesses statue!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Were you the ones who were calling me? Oh man,
is it time for me to receive a divine revelation or
something?!
